# =============================================================================
# backend/requirements-dev.txt — GENERATED. DO NOT EDIT BY HAND.
#
# A pinned mirror of pyproject.toml's [project.dependencies] PLUS the [dev]
# optional-dependencies extra (ruff, mypy, pytest, …). pyproject.toml remains the
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. This file exists for compatibility / reference only —
# the Dockerfile and CI install from pyproject (`pip install .[dev]`), NOT from
# this file. To add or change a dependency, edit pyproject.toml and regenerate;
# never hand-edit here (it will drift).
#
# Regenerate (resolves transitive versions, targeting Python 3.12):
#   cd backend && uv pip compile pyproject.toml --extra dev --python-version 3.12 \
#     --no-header -o requirements-dev.txt
# =============================================================================
